name: Buffet Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone and skin the chicken breasts.
2. Flour them lightly and brown in oil.
3. Season with salt and pepper; place in a large casserole dish.
4. In a separate pan, sauté garlic, onions, and mushrooms in butter until tender but not brown.
5. Add the sautéed mixture to the chicken.
6. Make a paste using flour, water, and sherry; pour over the chicken.
7. Sprinkle with paprika, thyme, and parsley.
8. Add black olives and pour over the consomme'.
9. Bake at 350°F until tender (about 40-60 minutes).
10. Stir in the sour cream until heated through (do not boil), about 10 minutes.
11. Serve hot in a chafing dish. This can be made ahead of time and frozen; just reheat and stir in the sour cream before serving.
